scenario.title: Maintain low stress proactively
actions: Light-touch inspections + prevention in emerging hotspots
Keep streets clean: schedule-based cleanup near business areas
Fix small safety issues before they escalate (lighting, visibility)

scenario.title: Grow quality business activity
actions: Encourage higher-value uses on key blocks (micro-incentives)
Support night/weekend economy with clear rules and events
Promote local identity: small placemaking + branded corridor

scenario.title: Make it more walkable and attractive
actions: Shade + comfort upgrades on main pedestrian streets
Bike/walk connectivity improvements to nearby districts
Public space enhancements near commercial nodes

scenario.title: Keep the baseline strong
actions: Preventive maintenance: lighting and cleanliness checks
Monitor early signs of stress (repeat complaints, hotspots)
Address small code issues quickly to avoid escalation

scenario.title: Gentle activation without disruption
actions: Start with 1 regular community market / vendor day
Enable small homegrown commerce with simple permits
Create a small business node (1 corridor / 1 cluster)

scenario.title: Improve comfort and identity
actions: Add shade and seating in a few visible locations
Improve safe walking links to schools/services
Small park / pocket space refresh

scenario.title: Reduce friction in an active but stressed district
actions: Compliance sprint: top violation categories + fast resolution process
Cleanliness & waste management upgrades near business clusters
Improve safety at peak hours (lighting + visibility + hotspots)

scenario.title: Support businesses while reducing stress
actions: Operational fixes: loading zones / short-stay parking / delivery windows
Façade + frontage improvements for key corridors
Business coordination: shared standards for signage, waste, upkeep

scenario.title: Upgrade the public realm without disruption
actions: Safer crossings and pedestrian flow on 1–2 corridors
Shade and stormwater improvements where foot traffic is highest
Quick public-space refresh (wayfinding, seating, lighting)

scenario.title: Stabilize the basics
actions: Targeted cleanup for nuisance properties (trash, overgrowth, dumping hotspots)
Focused inspections + follow-up fixes for repeat offenders
Improve street lighting at priority corridors and intersections

scenario.title: Kickstart micro-business activity
actions: Low-barrier pop-up permits for kiosks/markets on selected blocks
Small business support: simplified permitting + coaching clinic days
Activate one anchor event per month (market day / food & vendors)

scenario.title: Make the district feel safer and cooler
actions: Repair sidewalks on 1–2 priority pedestrian links
Add shade trees / shade structures on the same links
Small pocket improvements (benches, crossings, visibility)
